generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how weak domestic security laws put our families at risk. Last year, my neighborhood saw a 30% spike in suspicious activity after certain groups started exploiting loopholes. We need stronger powers to track and stop these threats before they escalate. It's our duty to protect what we've built. #SecureOurCommunities #LawAndOrder
